THE POOL ROOM

TWELVE WAYS TO RACK THE ROOM

Six tables · one room · see every option, then decide

walkthrough Walk it → A first-person tour of all twelve layouts. It auto-walks each room in from the Main Entrance — or click in and take the controls. https://kevinelong.github.io/pool-room-blender/walk.html download page Get the PDF → One tap, one file: the options study with sightlines and pros & cons, plus the one-page comparison sheet. https://kevinelong.github.io/pool-room-blender/get_pdf.html decision deck Weigh the options → Set the weights to what the house values — play, hospitality, service, events — and watch the twelve layouts re-rank live. https://kevinelong.github.io/pool-room-blender/deck.html layout editor Design your own → Start from any of the twelve, then drag, rotate, add and remove pieces — snapped to the same 6-inch grid the study uses. Save and share your variations. https://kevinelong.github.io/pool-room-blender/design.html

Putting it on a wall? Download the 8.5×14 print poster — same three links as QR codes.

A left 4+2 B left 2×3 C west 1×6 D west 1×6 low E center 2×3 F center 4+2

G center 2×3 wide H center 1×6 I right 4+2 J right 2×3 K east 1×6 L east 1×6 low

EVERY NUMBER COMPUTED FROM THE ROOM GEOMETRY — NOT ESTIMATED
